comment.body:
We can see this in SPX/LTY correlation, it tanked very negative. Equity risk appetite tends to recover, compressing VIX and another volatility measures.
Short-End Buybacks (Tue) and Long-End Buybacks (Thu) create dampened volatility initially. Futures First Notice Day (Fri) thins the front-month 10-yr futures (“ZN”), sparking basis squeezes and spikes in VIX/VXST.
comment.raw_body:
We can see this in SPX/LTY correlation, it tanked very negative. Equity risk appetite tends to recover, compressing VIX and another volatility measures.
Short-End Buybacks (Tue) and Long-End Buybacks (Thu) create dampened volatility initially. Futures First Notice Day (Fri) thins the front-month 10-yr futures (“ZN”), sparking basis squeezes and spikes in VIX/VXST.

comment.body: What is FND in the post?
comment.raw_body: What is FND in the post?

comment.body: A first notice day (FND) is the deadline date after which an investor who has purchased a futures contract may be required to take physical delivery of the contract's underlying commodity. The first notice day can vary by contract and will also depend on exchange rules.
comment.raw_body: A first notice day (FND) is the deadline date after which an investor who has purchased a futures contract may be required to take physical delivery of the contract's underlying commodity. The first notice day can vary by contract and will also depend on exchange rules.
